---
title: "Uarda: A Romance of Ancient Egypt, translated from German by Clara Bell"
---

## Uarda: A Romance of Ancient Egypt, translated from German by Clara Bell

**Author:** Georg Ebers
**Date:** 1877
**Imprint:** Leipzig: Tauchnitz

### Notes

First published in German, Stuttgart 1877.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
